---
title: "Cabezon sdmTMB"
author: "Dan Portnof"
date: "2026-02-25"
output: word_document
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r STAR report}
#Install packages (as needed)
#install.packages("r4ss")
#install.packages("here")

#Load packages
library(tidyverse)
library(r4ss)
library(here)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

wd <- "Cab_SCS_BC_STAR" # Mac

# This reads the output files
pp <- SS_output(wd)

# Pull out derived quantities.  These are things like SSB and age-0 recruits.
derived_quants <- pp[["derived_quants"]]

# Pull out parameter estimates.  Recruitment deviations are estimated parameters.  
params <- pp[["parameters"]]

# Plot recruitment deviations for the main estimation period.
devyrs <- 1970:2018
devdf <- pp$parameters[28:76, ]
devvalue <- devdf[,3]
devsd <- devdf[,11]
devlower <- (devvalue-1.96*devsd)
devmed   <- devvalue
devupper <- (devvalue+1.96*devsd)
y <- data.frame(year=devyrs, value=devmed,lo=devlower,hi=devupper)

STAR_recdevs <- ggplot(data=y, aes(x=year, ymin=devlower, ymax=devupper)) +
  geom_ribbon(fill="skyblue", alpha=0.5) +
  geom_line(aes(y=devmed)) +
  labs(title="Cabezon SoCal Recruitment Deviations") +
  theme_bw()

STAR_recdevs

# Plot age-0 recruits
age0yrs <- 1970:2018
startrowindex <- which(rownames(derived_quants)=="Recr_1970")
endrowindex <- which(rownames(derived_quants)=="Recr_2018")
age0 <- derived_quants[174:222, "Value"]
age0sd <- derived_quants[174:222, "StdDev"]
age0lower <- (age0-1.96*age0sd)
age0upper <- (age0+1.96*age0sd)

x <- data.frame(year=age0yrs, value=age0,lo=age0lower,hi=age0upper)

STAR_age0 <- ggplot(data=x, aes(x=year, ymin=age0lower, ymax=age0upper)) +
  geom_ribbon(fill="skyblue", alpha=0.5) +
  geom_line(aes(y=age0)) +
  labs(title="Cabezon SoCal Age 0 Recruits") +
  theme_bw()

STAR_age0

# Plot SSB
ssbyrs <- 1916:2018
startrowindex <- which(rownames(derived_quants)=="SSB_1916")
endrowindex <- which(rownames(derived_quants)=="SSB_2018")
ssb <- derived_quants[3:105, "Value"]
ssbsd <- derived_quants[3:105, "StdDev"]
ssblower <- (ssb-1.96*ssbsd)
ssbupper <- (ssb+1.96*ssbsd)

z <- data.frame(year=ssbyrs, value=ssb,lo=ssblower,hi=ssbupper)

STAR_SSB <- ggplot(data=z, aes(x=year, ymin=ssblower, ymax=ssbupper)) +
  geom_ribbon(fill="skyblue", alpha=0.5) +
  geom_line(aes(y=ssb)) +
  labs(title="Cabezon SoCal SSB") +
  theme_bw()

STAR_SSB

```

```{r load in cabezon data}
my.seed <- 666
set.seed(my.seed)

library(tidyverse)
library(sdmTMB)

cabezon <- read.csv("manta cabezon data for Dan.csv")

str(cabezon)
```

```{r Exploring cabezon data}

# One observation per station per season? Per month?
cabezon %>%
  count(year, season, line.station) %>%
  filter(n > 1)

cabezon %>%
  count(year, month, line.station) %>%
  filter(n > 1)

# One observation per station per cruise?
cabezon %>%
  count(cruise, line.station) %>%
  filter(n > 1)

# Given any duplicates, do we need to transform the data accordingly?

# Which stations are sampled across years? Are they the same?
cabezon %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarize(n_stations = n_distinct(line.station))
table(cabezon$line.station, cabezon$year)

# Check the grid
ggplot(cabezon, aes(longitude, latitude)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3)

cabezon %>%
  mutate(zero = larvae_100m3 == 0) %>%
  count(zero)

plot(cabezon$volume_sampled, cabezon$larvae_100m3)
hist(cabezon$larvae_100m3)

annual_cab_summary <- cabezon %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarize(
    mean_larvae = mean(larvae_100m3, na.rm = T),
    sd_larvae = sd(larvae_100m3, na.rm = T),
    n = n(),
    se = sd_larvae / sqrt(n)
  )

ggplot(annual_cab_summary, aes(x = year, y = mean_larvae)) +
  geom_line() + 
  geom_point() + 
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = mean_larvae - se,
                  ymax = mean_larvae + se),
              alpha = 0.5,
              fill = "skyblue") +
  geom_line(color = "black") +
  geom_point(color = "black") +
  #geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_larvae - se,
  #                  ymax = mean_larvae + se),
  #              width = 0.2) +
  scale_y_continuous(trans = "log1p") +
  labs(
    x = "Year",
    y = expression("Mean larvae per 100 m"^3),
    title = "Annual Mean Larval Abundance",
    subtitle = expression("Ribbon shows " %+-% " 1 SE")
  ) +
  theme_bw()

ggplot(annual_cab_summary, aes(x = year, y = mean_larvae)) +
  geom_line() + 
  geom_point() + 
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = mean_larvae - se,
                  ymax = mean_larvae + se),
              alpha = 0.5,
              fill = "skyblue") +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(color = "steelblue") +
  #geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_larvae - se,
  #                  ymax = mean_larvae + se),
  #              width = 0.2) +
  labs(
    x = "Year",
    y = expression("Mean larvae per 100 m"^3),
    title = "Annual Mean Larval Abundance",
    subtitle = expression("Ribbon shows " %+-% " 1 SE")
  ) +
  theme_bw()

STAR_age0
STAR_SSB
STAR_recdevs


# STAR Recruit 0's against CalCOFI abundance

STAR_age0_calcofi_abundance <- left_join(x, annual_cab_summary, by = "year") 

scale_factor <- max(STAR_age0_calcofi_abundance$value, na.rm = T) / max(STAR_age0_calcofi_abundance$mean_larvae, na.rm = T)

STAR_age0_calcofi_abundance_plot <- ggplot(STAR_age0_calcofi_abundance,
                                           aes(x = year)) +
  
  # Recruit ribbon
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lo, ymax = hi),
              fill = "skyblue", alpha = 0.5) +
  
  # Recruit line
  geom_line(aes(y = value), color= "black") +

  # Larval abundance line
  geom_line(aes(y = mean_larvae * scale_factor),
            color = "coral") +
  
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = "Age-0 Recruits",
    sec.axis = sec_axis(~ . / scale_factor,
                        name = expression("Mean Larvae per 100 m" ^3))
  ) +
  
  labs(title = "SoCal Cabezon Age-0 Recruits and Larval Abundance Over Time") +
  theme_bw()

STAR_age0_calcofi_abundance_plot

# STAR recruitment deviations against CalCOFI abundance

STAR_recdevs_calcofi_abundance <- left_join(y, annual_cab_summary, by = "year") 

scale_factor <- max(STAR_recdevs_calcofi_abundance$value, na.rm = T) / max(STAR_recdevs_calcofi_abundance$mean_larvae, na.rm = T)

STAR_recdevs_calcofi_abundance_plot <- ggplot(STAR_recdevs_calcofi_abundance,
                                           aes(x = year)) +
  
  # Recruit ribbon
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lo, ymax = hi),
              fill = "skyblue", alpha = 0.5) +
  
  # Recruit line
  geom_line(aes(y = value), color= "black") +

  # Larval abundance line
  geom_line(aes(y = mean_larvae * scale_factor),
            color = "coral") +
  
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = "Recruitment Deviations",
    sec.axis = sec_axis(~ . / scale_factor,
                        name = expression("Mean Larvae per 100 m" ^3))
  ) +
  
  labs(title = "SoCal Cabezon Recruitment Deviations and Larval Abundance Over Time") +
  theme_bw()

STAR_recdevs_calcofi_abundance_plot


# Testing cross correlation between STAR outputs and CalCOFI observations

# Rec Devs
STAR_recdevs_calcofi_abundance %>% filter(is.na(mean_larvae) | is.na(value))
obs_STAR_recdevs_calcofi_abundance <- STAR_recdevs_calcofi_abundance %>%
  filter(year %in% annual_cab_summary$year & year %in% y$year)

ccf(obs_STAR_recdevs_calcofi_abundance$mean_larvae, obs_STAR_recdevs_calcofi_abundance$value,
    lag.max = 10,
    main = "CCF: Larvae vs Recruitment Deviations (observed years only)")

# Age-0's
STAR_age0_calcofi_abundance %>% filter(is.na(mean_larvae) | is.na(value))
obs_STAR_age0_calcofi_abundance <- STAR_age0_calcofi_abundance %>%
  filter(year %in% annual_cab_summary$year & year %in% x$year)

ccf(obs_STAR_age0_calcofi_abundance$mean_larvae, obs_STAR_age0_calcofi_abundance$value,
    lag.max = 10,
    main = "CCF: Larvae vs Age-0 Recruits (observed years only)")

# Larval abundance by station by year

library(sf)
library(rnaturalearth)
library(rnaturalearthdata)

cabezon_sf <- st_as_sf(
  cabezon,
  coords = c("longitude", "latitude"),
  crs = 4326       # WGS84
)

world <- ne_coastline(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf")

# zoom to CalCOFI-ish region
x_limits <- c(-122, -117)
y_limits <- c(31, 36)

ggplot(cabezon) +
  geom_point(
    aes(x = longitude, y = latitude, size = larvae_100m3, color = year),
    alpha = 0.6
  ) +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(1, 10)) +
  borders("world", colour = "gray40") +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(-122, -117), ylim = c(31, 36), expand = FALSE) +
  labs(
    title = "Cabezon Larval Abundance by Station",
    size = expression("Larvae per 10 m"^3)
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

#cabezon <- cabezon %>%
#  filter(!(year == 2014 & season == "winter"))

#cabezon %>%
#  count(year, season)

# Composite station column (combines line + station)
cabezon <- cabezon %>%
  mutate(station_id = paste(line, station, sep = "_"))

# Average larvae-positive tows by year
pos_tows_year <- cabezon %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(
    total_tows        = n(),
    positive_tows     = sum(larvae_100m3 > 0),
    pct_positive_tows = positive_tows / total_tows * 100
  )

pos_tows_year

# Average larvae-positive tows by month
pos_tows_month <- cabezon %>%
  group_by(month) %>%
  summarise(
    total_tows        = n(),
    positive_tows     = sum(larvae_100m3 > 0),
    pct_positive_tows = positive_tows / total_tows * 100
  )

pos_tows_month

# Average larvae-positive tows by season
pos_tows_season <- cabezon %>%
  group_by(season) %>%
  summarise(
    total_tows        = n(),
    positive_tows     = sum(larvae_100m3 > 0),
    pct_positive_tows = positive_tows / total_tows * 100
  )

pos_tows_season

# Average larvae-positive tows by station
pos_tows_station <- cabezon %>%
  group_by(station_id) %>%
  summarise(
    total_tows        = n(),
    positive_tows     = sum(larvae_100m3 > 0),
    pct_positive_tows = positive_tows / total_tows * 100
  )

pos_tows_station

# Average larvae count by year
avg_larvae_year <- cabezon %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_all      = mean(larvae_100m3),
    mean_positive = mean(larvae_100m3[larvae_100m3 > 0])
  )

avg_larvae_year

# Average larvae count by month
avg_larvae_month <- cabezon %>%
  group_by(month) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_all      = mean(larvae_100m3),
    mean_positive = mean(larvae_100m3[larvae_100m3 > 0])
  )

avg_larvae_month

# Average larvae count by season
avg_larvae_season <- cabezon %>%
  group_by(season) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_all      = mean(larvae_100m3),
    mean_positive = mean(larvae_100m3[larvae_100m3 > 0])
  )

avg_larvae_season

# Average larvae count by station
avg_larvae_station <- cabezon %>%
  group_by(station_id) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_all      = mean(larvae_100m3),
    mean_positive = mean(larvae_100m3[larvae_100m3 > 0])
  )

avg_larvae_station


# Showing proportion positive tows per year, month, and season:
# ── SPLIT plot_data ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

plot_data_year <- plot_data %>% filter(group_var == "Year")
plot_data_ms   <- plot_data %>% filter(group_var %in% c("Month", "Season"))

# ── SHARED ELEMENTS ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

shared_fill <- scale_fill_manual(
  values = c("negative_tows" = "grey80", "positive_tows" = "steelblue"),
  labels = c("negative_tows" = "Larvae Absent", "positive_tows" = "Larvae Present")
)

shared_theme <- theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    strip.text         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13),
    axis.text.x        = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position    = "bottom",
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
    plot.subtitle      = element_text(color = "grey40", size = 10)
  )

# ── YEAR: standalone ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

p_year <- ggplot(plot_data_year, aes(x = level, y = count, fill = tow_type)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 0.7) +
  shared_fill +
  shared_theme +
  labs(
    title    = "Cabezon Larvae: Positive vs. Total Tows",
    subtitle = "Stacked bars show larvae-present (blue) against total sampling effort (grey)",
    x        = NULL,
    y        = "Number of Tows",
    fill     = NULL
  )

# ── MONTH + SEASON: faceted ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

p_month_season <- ggplot(plot_data_ms, aes(x = level, y = count, fill = tow_type)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 0.7) +
  facet_wrap(~ group_var, scales = "free_x", nrow = 1) +
  shared_fill +
  shared_theme +
  labs(
    title    = "Cabezon Larvae: Positive vs. Total Tows",
    subtitle = "Stacked bars show larvae-present (blue) against total sampling effort (grey)",
    x        = NULL,
    y        = "Number of Tows",
    fill     = NULL
  )

p_year
p_month_season


# Showing larvae tow average + SD per year, month, and season breakdown

# ── PREP ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

box_data <- bind_rows(
  cabezon %>% mutate(group_var = "Year",   level = as.character(year)),
  cabezon %>% mutate(group_var = "Month",  level = as.character(month)),
  cabezon %>% mutate(group_var = "Season", level = as.character(season))
) %>%
  filter(larvae_100m3 > 0) %>%
  mutate(
    log_larvae = log(larvae_100m3),
    group_var  = factor(group_var, levels = c("Year", "Month", "Season")),
    level = case_when(
      group_var == "Month"  ~ factor(level, levels = as.character(1:12)),
      group_var == "Season" ~ factor(level, levels = c("winter", "spring", "summer", "fall")),
      TRUE                  ~ factor(level)
    )
  )

# ── SPLIT ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

box_data_year <- box_data %>% filter(group_var == "Year")
box_data_ms   <- box_data %>% filter(group_var %in% c("Month", "Season"))

# ── SHARED ELEMENTS ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

shared_box_theme <- theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    strip.text         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13),
    axis.text.x        = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position    = "none",
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
    plot.subtitle      = element_text(color = "grey40", size = 10)
  )

# ── YEAR: standalone ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

p_year_box <- ggplot(box_data_year, aes(x = level, y = log_larvae)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "#2a7bb5", color = "grey30", alpha = 0.7, outlier.size = 1) +
  shared_box_theme +
  labs(
    title    = "Cabezon Larvae: Average Count by Year (Positive Tows Only)",
    subtitle = "Log-transformed larvae per 100m³; zero-catch tows excluded",
    x        = NULL,
    y        = "log(Larvae per 100m³)"
  )

# ── MONTH + SEASON: faceted ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

p_ms_box <- ggplot(box_data_ms, aes(x = level, y = log_larvae)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "#2a7bb5", color = "grey30", alpha = 0.7, outlier.size = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ group_var, scales = "free_x", nrow = 1) +
  shared_box_theme +
  labs(
    title    = "Cabezon Larvae: Average Count by Month and Season (Positive Tows Only)",
    subtitle = "Log-transformed larvae per 100m³; zero-catch tows excluded",
    x        = NULL,
    y        = "log(Larvae per 100m³)"
  )

p_year_box
p_ms_box


# Visualizing station performance across time

# ── HEATMAP: mean log-larvae by station and year ──────────────────────────────

# by year
heatmap_data_year <- cabezon %>%
  filter(larvae_100m3 > 0) %>%
  group_by(line.station, year) %>%
  summarise(mean_log_larvae = mean(log(larvae_100m3)), .groups = "drop")

ggplot(heatmap_data, aes(x = year, y = line.station, fill = mean_log_larvae)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "mako", name = "log(Larvae\nper 100m³)") +
  scale_y_discrete(limits = rev) +
  labs(
    title = "Cabezon Larval Abundance by Station and Year",
    subtitle = "Positive tows only; white = no positive tows recorded",
    x = NULL, y = "South \u2190 Station \u2192 North"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    axis.text.y    = element_text(size = 7),
    plot.title     = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
    plot.subtitle  = element_text(color = "grey40", size = 10)
  )

# by month
heatmap_data_month <- cabezon %>%
  filter(larvae_100m3 > 0) %>%
  group_by(line.station, month) %>%
  summarise(mean_log_larvae = mean(log(larvae_100m3)), .groups = "drop")

#ggplot(heatmap_data_month, aes(x = month, y = line.station, fill = mean_log_larvae)) +
#  geom_tile() +
#  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "mako", name = "log(Larvae\nper 100m³)") +
#  scale_x_continuous(
#    breaks = 1:12,
#    labels = month.abb
#  ) +
#  labs(
#    title = "Cabezon Larval Abundance by Station and Month",
#    subtitle = "Positive tows only; white = no positive tows recorded",
#    x = NULL, y = "North \u2190 Station \u2192 South"
#  ) +
#  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
#  theme(
#    axis.text.y    = element_text(size = 7),
#    plot.title     = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
#    plot.subtitle  = element_text(color = "grey40", size = 10)
#  )

ggplot(heatmap_data_month, aes(x = month, y = line.station, fill = mean_log_larvae)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "mako", name = "log(Larvae\nper 100m³)") +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = 1:12,
    labels = month.abb
  ) +
  scale_y_discrete(limits = rev) +
  labs(
    title = "Cabezon Larval Abundance by Station and Month",
    subtitle = "Positive tows only; white = no positive tows recorded",
    x = NULL, y = "South \u2190 Station \u2192 North"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    axis.text.y    = element_text(size = 7),
    plot.title     = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
    plot.subtitle  = element_text(color = "grey40", size = 10)
  )


# by season
heatmap_data_szn <- cabezon %>%
  filter(larvae_100m3 > 0) %>%
  group_by(line.station, season) %>%
  summarise(mean_log_larvae = mean(log(larvae_100m3)), .groups = "drop")

ggplot(heatmap_data_szn, aes(x = season, y = line.station, fill = mean_log_larvae)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "mako", name = "log(Larvae\nper 100m³)") +
  scale_y_discrete(limits = rev) +
  labs(
    title = "Cabezon Larval Abundance by Station and Season",
    subtitle = "Positive tows only; white = no positive tows recorded",
    x = NULL, y = "South \u2190 Station \u2192 North"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    axis.text.y    = element_text(size = 7),
    plot.title     = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
    plot.subtitle  = element_text(color = "grey40", size = 10)
  )


# CalCOFI map with labeled stations
library(maps)

# ── PREP: one point per station ───────────────────────────────────────────────

station_locations <- cabezon %>%
  group_by(line.station) %>%
  summarise(
    latitude  = mean(latitude),
    longitude = mean(longitude),
    .groups   = "drop"
  )

# ── BASE MAP ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

coast <- map_data("world", region = "USA")

ggplot() +
  geom_polygon(data = coast, aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group),
               fill = "grey85", color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_point(data = station_locations,
             aes(x = longitude, y = latitude),
             color = "#2a7bb5", size = 2) +
  geom_text(data = station_locations,
            aes(x = longitude, y = latitude, label = line.station),
            size = 2.5, hjust = -0.15, vjust = 0.4, color = "grey20") +
  coord_fixed(
    ratio  = 1.3,
    xlim   = c(min(station_locations$longitude) - 1, max(station_locations$longitude) + 1),
    ylim   = c(min(station_locations$latitude)  - 1, max(station_locations$latitude)  + 1)
  ) +
  labs(
    title    = "Cabezon Larvae Sampling Stations",
    subtitle = "CalCOFI survey stations; labels show line.station identifier",
    x        = "Longitude",
    y        = "Latitude"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "grey40", size = 10),
    panel.grid    = element_line(color = "grey92")
  )

```

```{r sdmTMB model fit, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

cab_mesh <- make_mesh(
  cabezon,
  xy_cols = c("longitude", "latitude"),
  cutoff = 0.15
)

plot(cab_mesh); title("SPDE Mesh for Cabezon CalCOFI analysis")

# Delta-gamma fit 1; spatial & spatiotemporal with ar1 autoregression
cab_fit1 <- sdmTMB(
  list(larvae_100m3 ~ 1, larvae_100m3 ~ 1),
  data = cabezon,
  mesh = cab_mesh,
  time = "year",
  family = delta_gamma(),
  spatial = list("on", "on"),
  spatiotemporal = list("ar1", "ar1"),
  offset = NULL
)

cab_fit1
sanity(cab_fit1)

# Delta-gamma fit 1a; spatiotemporal off
cab_fit1a <- sdmTMB(
  list(larvae_100m3 ~ 1, larvae_100m3 ~ 1),
  data = cabezon,
  mesh = cab_mesh,
  time = "year",
  family = delta_gamma(),
  spatial = list("on", "on"),
  spatiotemporal = list("off", "off"),
  offset = NULL
)

cab_fit1a
sanity(cab_fit1a)

# Delta-gamma fit 1b; spatial ar1, spatiotemporal off
cab_fit1b <- sdmTMB(
  list(larvae_100m3 ~ 1, larvae_100m3 ~ 1),
  data = cabezon,
  mesh = cab_mesh,
  time = "year",
  family = delta_gamma(),
  spatial = list("on", "on"),
  spatiotemporal = list("ar1", "off"),
  offset = NULL
)

cab_fit1b
sanity(cab_fit1b)

# Delta-gamma fit 1c; spatial off
cab_fit1c <- sdmTMB(
  list(larvae_100m3 ~ 1, larvae_100m3 ~ 1),
  data = cabezon,
  mesh = cab_mesh,
  time = "year",
  family = delta_gamma(),
  spatial = list("on", "on"),
  spatiotemporal = list("off", "ar1"),
  offset = NULL
)

cab_fit1c
sanity(cab_fit1c)

# Tweedie fit 2; spatial & spatiotemporal with ar1 autoregression
cab_fit2 <- sdmTMB(
  formula = larvae_100m3 ~ 1,
  data = cabezon,
  mesh = cab_mesh,
  time = "year",
  family = tweedie(),
  spatial = "on",
  spatiotemporal = "ar1",
  offset = NULL
)

cab_fit2
sanity(cab_fit2)

# Tweedie fit 2a; spatiotemporal off
cab_fit2a <- sdmTMB(
  formula = larvae_100m3 ~ 1,
  data = cabezon,
  mesh = cab_mesh,
  time = "year",
  family = tweedie(),
  spatial = "on",
  spatiotemporal = "off",
  offset = NULL
)

cab_fit2a
sanity(cab_fit2a)

# Model Comparison
AIC(cab_fit1, cab_fit1a, cab_fit1b, cab_fit1c, cab_fit2, cab_fit2a)

cv_m1 <- sdmTMB_cv(
  cab_fit1$call$formula, 
  cabezon, 
  cab_mesh, 
  delta_gamma(),
  k_folds = 5
  )

cv_m1a <- sdmTMB_cv(
  cab_fit1a$call$formula, 
  cabezon, 
  cab_mesh, 
  delta_gamma(), 
  k_folds = 5
  )

cv_m1b <- sdmTMB_cv(
  cab_fit1b$call$formula, 
  cabezon, 
  cab_mesh, 
  delta_gamma(), 
  k_folds = 5
  )

cv_m1c <- sdmTMB_cv(
  cab_fit1c$call$formula, 
  cabezon, 
  cab_mesh, 
  delta_gamma(), 
  k_folds = 5
  )

cv_m2 <- sdmTMB_cv(
  cab_fit2a$call$formula, 
  cabezon, 
  cab_mesh, 
  tweedie(), 
  k_folds = 5
  )

cv_m2a <- sdmTMB_cv(
  cab_fit2a$call$formula, 
  cabezon, 
  cab_mesh, 
  tweedie(), 
  k_folds = 5
  )

cv_m1$sum_loglik
cv_m1a$sum_loglik
cv_m1b$sum_loglik
cv_m1c$sum_loglik
cv_m2$sum_loglik
cv_m2a$sum_loglik

cv_table <- data.frame(model = c("Delta-Gamma spatial + spatiotemporal AR1",
                                 "Delta-Gamma spatial",
                                 "Delta-Gamma spatiotemporal Delta AR1",
                                 "Delta-Gamma spatiotemporal Gamma AR1",
                                 "Tweedie spatial + spatiotemporal AR1",
                                 "Tweedie spatial"),
                       AIC = c(AIC(cab_fit1),
                               AIC(cab_fit1a),
                               AIC(cab_fit1b),
                               AIC(cab_fit1c),
                               AIC(cab_fit2),
                               AIC(cab_fit2a)),
                       Cross_Validation = c(cv_m1$sum_loglik,
                                            cv_m1a$sum_loglik,
                                            cv_m1b$sum_loglik,
                                            cv_m1c$sum_loglik,
                                            cv_m2$sum_loglik,
                                            cv_m2a$sum_loglik)
  
)

cv_table$delta_CV <- cv_table$Cross_Validation - min(cv_table$Cross_Validation)
cv_table$delta_AIC <- cv_table$AIC - min(cv_table$AIC)

cv_table <- cv_table[order(cv_table$Cross_Validation), ]

cv_table

tidy(cab_fit1, effects = "ran_pars")
tidy(cab_fit2, effects = "ran_pars")

```

```{r model fit diagnostics}
cab_mesh$mesh$loc[1:5, ]

pred_grid <- expand.grid(
  longitude = seq(x_limits[1], x_limits[2], by = 0.05),
  latitude = seq(y_limits[1], y_limits[2], by = 0.05)
) %>%
  tidyr::crossing(year = as.integer(sort(unique(cabezon$year))))

# Test a single year's heatmap
#ggplot(cab_map %>% filter(year == 1998), 
#       aes(x = longitude, y = latitude, fill = est)) +
#  geom_raster() +
#  scale_fill_viridis_c()


# Calibrating our predicted results against our observations
pred_obs <- predict(cab_fit1, type = "response")
names(pred_obs)
head(pred_obs)

pred_obs %>%
  summarise(
    obs_mean = mean(larvae_100m3, na.rm = TRUE),
    pred_mean = mean(est, na.rm = TRUE),
    obs_occ = mean(larvae_100m3 > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    pred_occ = mean(est1, na.rm = TRUE),
    obs_pos_mean = mean(larvae_100m3[larvae_100m3 > 0], na.rm = TRUE),
    pred_pos_mean = mean(est2, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

pred_obs$presence <- pred_obs$larvae_100m3 > 0

pred_obs %>%
  mutate(prob_bin = cut(est1, breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.1))) %>%
  group_by(prob_bin) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_pred = mean(est1),
    observed_presence = mean(presence),
    n = n()
  )

# What do our predicted values look like against our observed values?
plot(
  x = pred_obs$est,
  y = cabezon$larvae_100m3,
  xlab = "Predicted",
  ylab = "Observed"
)
abline(0, 1, lty = 2)

# On the log scale?
plot(log1p(pred_obs$est), log1p(cabezon$larvae_100m3),
     xlab = "log(Predicted + 1)", ylab = "log(Observed + 1)")
abline(0, 1, lty = 2)

# Looking only at the Gamma (positive density) component?
pos_idx <- cabezon$larvae_100m3 > 0
plot(log(pred_obs$est2[pos_idx]), log(cabezon$larvae_100m3[pos_idx]),
     xlab = "log(Predicted positive abundance)",
     ylab = "log(Observed positive abundance)")
abline(0, 1, lty = 2)

# How do summary values compare?
calibration_plot <- pred_obs %>%
  mutate(prob_bin = cut(est1, breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.1))) %>%
  group_by(prob_bin) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_pred = mean(est1),
    observed = mean(presence)
  )

plot(calibration_plot$mean_pred, calibration_plot$observed,
     xlab = "Predicted presence probability",
     ylab = "Observed presence frequency")
abline(0,1,lty=2)

# Randomized quantile residuals (QQ)
rq_res <- residuals(cab_fit1, type = "mle-mvn")

qqnorm(rq_res)
qqline(rq_res)

pred_obs$rq_resid <- rq_res
ggplot(pred_obs, aes(x = longitude, y = latitude, color = rq_resid)) +
  geom_point() +
  scale_color_gradient2() +
  facet_wrap(~ year)

# Temporal calibration: are predictions tracking temporal trends?
pred_obs %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarize(
    obs = mean(larvae_100m3),
    pred = mean(est)
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = year)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = obs), color = "black") +
  geom_line(aes(y = pred), color = "blue", linetype = "dashed")

# Call our cab_map to create the standardized annual index with uncertainty; this index looks bad!! Signal is completely swamped by uncertainty. Could be that the index is trying to interpolate too much in years with no CalCOFI data. Either way, we gotta figure this one out.
cab_map <- predict(cab_fit1, newdata = pred_grid,
                   return_tmb_object = T)

cab_map_ind <- predict(cab_fit1, newdata = pred_grid, return_tmb_object = T)
cab_index <- get_index(cab_map_ind, area = 0.05^2, bias_correct = T)

ggplot(cab_index, aes(x = year, y = est)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lwr, ymax = upr), alpha = 0.3) +
  labs(y = "Estimated abundance index", x = "Year")

# As a diagnostic, let's try a prediction grid + index only using observed stations and years.
pred_grid_obs <- cabezon %>%
  dplyr::select(longitude, latitude, year) %>%
  distinct()

cab_map_obs <- predict(cab_fit1,
                       newdata = pred_grid_obs,
                       return_tmb_object = T)

cab_index_obs <- get_index(cab_map_obs,
                           area = 1,
                           bias_correct = T)

ggplot(cab_index_obs, aes(x = year, y = est)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lwr, ymax = upr), alpha = 0.3) +
  labs(y = "Estimated abundance index", x = "Year")

# Create one data frame to house all STAR + index data
combined <- cab_index_obs %>%
  dplyr::select(year, est) %>%
  rename(larvae_index = est) %>%
  left_join(z, by = "year") %>%
  left_join(y, by = "year") %>%
  left_join(x, by = "year")

## and filter to observed years
combined_obs <- combined %>%
  filter(!is.na(larvae_index) | is.na(value))

# Test the "restricted" index against age-0 recruits
ccf(cab_index_obs$est, STAR_age0_calcofi_abundance$value,
    lag.max = 10,
    main = "CCF: Restricted Larval Index vs. Age-0 Recruits")

# And against recruitment deviations
ccf(cab_index_obs$est, STAR_recdevs_calcofi_abundance$value,
    lag.max = 10,
    main = "CCF: Restricted Larval Index vs. Recruitment Deviations")

# Nothing really :( when we try against SSB, we get some strong signal, but this is probably due to a shared declining trend. We can try to parse that.
ccf(z$value, cab_index_obs$est,
    lag.max = 10,
    main = "CCF: Restricted Larval Index vs. Spawning Stock Biomass")

larvae_detrended <- residuals(lm(larvae_index ~ year, data = combined_obs))
ssb_detrended <- residuals(lm(value ~ year, data = combined_obs))

ccf(larvae_detrended, ssb_detrended, lag.max = 10)


```

```{r Plotting model fits, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=14, fig.height=10}

# ── In-sample predictions ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────

# Delta-Gamma: est1 = occurrence prob, est2 = positive catch rate, combined = est1 * est2
pred_dg <- predict(cab_fit1, type = "response")
pred_dg$est_combined <- pred_dg$est1 * pred_dg$est2

# Tweedie: est is the combined expected value in response scale
pred_tw <- predict(cab_fit2, type = "response")

# Attach predicted values to observed data
obs_dg <- cabezon %>% mutate(predicted = pred_dg$est_combined, observed = larvae_100m3)
obs_tw <- cabezon %>% mutate(predicted = pred_tw$est,           observed = larvae_100m3)

# ── Grid predictions for spatial maps ─────────────────────────────────────────

# Delta-Gamma (cab_map already exists; add combined column)
cab_map$est_combined <- cab_map$est1 * cab_map$est2

# Tweedie grid predictions
cab_map_tw <- predict(cab_fit2, newdata = pred_grid, type = "response")

# ── 1. Predicted vs. Observed scatter plots ───────────────────────────────────

scatter_dg <- ggplot(obs_dg, aes(x = predicted, y = observed)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.35, size = 1.2) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_x_continuous(trans = "log1p", labels = scales::comma) +
  scale_y_continuous(trans = "log1p", labels = scales::comma) +
  labs(
    title = "Delta-Gamma: Predicted vs. Observed",
    x = expression("Predicted larvae per 100 m"^3),
    y = expression("Observed larvae per 100 m"^3)
  ) +
  theme_bw()

scatter_tw <- ggplot(obs_tw, aes(x = predicted, y = observed)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.35, size = 1.2) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_x_continuous(trans = "log1p", labels = scales::comma) +
  scale_y_continuous(trans = "log1p", labels = scales::comma) +
  labs(
    title = "Tweedie: Predicted vs. Observed",
    x = expression("Predicted larvae per 100 m"^3),
    y = expression("Observed larvae per 100 m"^3)
  ) +
  theme_bw()

scatter_dg
scatter_tw

# ── 2. Faceted spatial maps: predicted surface + observed points ───────────────

plot_spatial_fit <- function(grid_preds, est_col, obs_data, model_name) {
  ggplot() +
    geom_raster(
      data = grid_preds,
      aes(x = longitude, y = latitude, fill = log1p(.data[[est_col]])),
      interpolate = TRUE
    ) +
    geom_sf(data = world, color = "gray30", fill = "gray85", linewidth = 0.3) +
    geom_point(
      data = obs_data,
      aes(x = longitude, y = latitude, size = log1p(larvae_100m3)),
      shape = 21, fill = "white", color = "black", stroke = 0.3, alpha = 0.75
    ) +
    scale_fill_viridis_c(
      name = expression(log(1 + hat(y))),
      option = "plasma",
      na.value = NA
    ) +
    scale_size_continuous(
      name = expression(log(1 + y)),
      range = c(0.3, 3.5)
    ) +
    coord_sf(xlim = x_limits, ylim = y_limits, expand = FALSE) +
    facet_wrap(~ year) +
    labs(title = paste(model_name, "— Predicted Surface & Observed Points")) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 9) +
    theme(
      strip.text     = element_text(size = 7),
      axis.text      = element_text(size = 6),
      legend.title   = element_text(size = 8),
      legend.key.height = unit(0.6, "cm")
    )
}

plot_spatial_fit(cab_map,    "est_combined", cabezon, "Delta-Gamma")
plot_spatial_fit(cab_map_tw, "est",          cabezon, "Tweedie")

```
